task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo dashboard or any Odoo application interface is visible, indicating successful login with the admin account.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to the Quality application and Quality Control Points
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Quality' app is open, and the 'Quality Control Points' list or menu is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent opened the 'Cabinet Inspection' Quality Control Point
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form view for the Quality Control Point titled 'Cabinet Inspection' is open. The Product field should show 'Cabinet with Doors' and Operations should show 'Receipts'.

task_completion.description: Agent updated the Vendor field to 'Gemini Furniture'
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Cabinet Inspection' QCP form, the 'Vendor' (or similar partner restriction) field is populated with 'Gemini Furniture'.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the updated Quality Control Point
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QCP form is in a saved state (e.g., no unsaved changes indicator, the save icon is not prompting for action, or a 'Saved' notification is visible) with 'Gemini Furniture' still present in the Vendor field.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Odoo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Odoo GUI, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing curl, python XML-RPC scripts, or direct database queries are used to modify the record.

integrity.description: Agent selected the vendor from the valid Odoo relational dropdown
integrity.visual_evidence: The vendor 'Gemini Furniture' appears as a standard Odoo relational badge/link in the form, not just as plain text typed into an arbitrary text box or HTML-edited element.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Quality Control Point (QCP) is titled 'Cabinet Inspection', associated with the product 'Cabinet with Doors' and the operation 'Receipts' (code: 'incoming'). The initial state of this QCP has an empty vendor field. The correct end state requires the vendor field to be explicitly set to 'Gemini Furniture'.
